assertions.title: Search Endpoint — POST /api/public/ai-context/search Reachable
assertions.issues: Endpoint is reachable but fails with 500 due to invalid Voyage API key.

assertions.title: Search Endpoint — Request Body Validation
assertions.issues: Valid payload fails with 500 due to invalid Voyage API key.

assertions.title: Search Endpoint — Public (No Auth Required)
assertions.issues: Fails with 500 due to Voyage API key, but no 401 Unauthorized was returned, which implies it is public.

assertions.title: Search Endpoint — Happy Path Response Conforms to AiContextResponseSchema
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

assertions.title: Search Endpoint — Results Ranked by Cosine Similarity Descending
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

assertions.title: Search Endpoint — Maximum 10 Chunks Returned
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

assertions.title: Search Endpoint — Filter by space
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

assertions.title: Search Endpoint — Filter by version
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

assertions.title: Search Endpoint — Unknown Space/Version Returns Empty Chunks
assertions.issues: Fails with 500 VoyageAIError instead of returning empty chunks gracefully.

assertions.title: Search Endpoint — Empty DB Returns Empty Chunks
assertions.issues: Fails with 500 VoyageAIError instead of returning empty chunks gracefully.

assertions.title: Publish-to-Semantic-Search — Document Findable After Publish
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

assertions.title: Non-Published Documents Never Produce Chunks
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

assertions.title: Space Scoping — Chunks From Other Spaces Not Returned
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

assertions.title: Version Scoping — Draft Version Documents Not Returned
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

assertions.title: Re-publish Refreshes Chunks — Old Content No Longer Findable
assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid Voyage API key

blockers.description: Voyage API key in apps/api/.env is 'your-voyage-ai-api-key-here', causing all semantic search queries to fail with 500 (VoyageAIError: 401 Unauthorized)
blockers.quickFixAttempted: None. Subagents must not modify shared environment variables like API keys.

summary: Tested 15 assertions. 5 failed and 10 were blocked due to invalid Voyage API key.
